title_cn: 信用优势：冒险的私人债务中的无聊是美丽的（播客）
summary: Private lenders are going back to basics as debt trouble spreads, market participants tell Bloomberg News’ James Crombie in this special episode of the Credit Edge podcast. “Boring is beautiful, boring is better right now,” says Christina Lee, managing director at Oaktree Capital Management. The podcast also explores AI debt risks, software distress, how tight bond spreads can go and the state of US consumers with the following guests: Matt Brill, head of North America investment-grade credit at

title: SpaceX IPO Draws More Than $100 Billion in Retail Orders
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股吸引了超过 1000 亿美元的零售订单
summary: Retail investors bidding for shares in SpaceX’s initial public offering have submitted more than $100 billion in orders, according to people familiar with the matter, as the potentially record-breaking debut enters the home stretch.

title: Novo’s Wegovy Pill Wins Approval in UK for Obesity Treatment
title_cn: Novo 的 Wegovy 药丸在英国获得批准用于肥胖治疗
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S’s Wegovy pill was approved in the UK, opening up the obesity market to people who are wary of taking a shot.

title_cn: 如果 SpaceX（及其创始人）在历史性 IPO 后蓬勃发展，德克萨斯州将受益
summary: Elon Musk’s adopted home state has a lot riding on his success, too

title: BlackRock’s SpaceX IPO Share Order Said to Target $5 Billion
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 SpaceX IPO 股票订单据称目标为 50 亿美元
summary: BlackRock Inc. is seeking to buy shares in SpaceX’s initial public offering and is targeting an amount of about $5 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, as investors jockey for allocations in what’s expected to be the biggest listing ever.

title: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack
title_cn: 现在斯塔默的对手可以将防守转变为进攻
summary: The departure of one of Labour’s most loyal servants threatens to accelerate a change of prime minister

title: Who’s Really Paying for This Year’s World Cup?
title_cn: 谁真正为今年的世界杯买单？
summary: Want to see the World Cup final? That’ll be $10,000. Bloomberg’s Big Take host David Gura and Vanessa Perdomo get into dynamic pricing and surging costs for host countries as the games kick off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ecuador to Cut Beer Prices 20% in World Cup Show of ‘Support’
title_cn: 厄瓜多尔将啤酒降价 20% 以示“支持”世界杯
summary: Ecuador is cutting beer prices by more than 20% through a temporary tax cut to rally “extra support” for the national football team during the World Cup, President Daniel Noboa said.

title: EM Currencies, Stock ETFs Rally as Trump Signals Deal Is Near
title_cn: 特朗普暗示协议即将达成，新兴市场货币和股票 ETF 上涨
summary: Emerging-market assets got a boost after President Donald Trump canceled planned attacks on Iran, fueling bets that a deal is imminent.

title: Bank Stocks Hit Record Highs on US-Iran Deal Hopes, IPO Optimism
title_cn: 美国与伊朗达成协议的希望和首次公开募股的乐观情绪推动银行股创下历史新高
summary: Shares of US lenders reached their highest levels ever on Thursday, as investors turned optimistic about a potential deal to stop the fighting in Iran and SpaceX’s record IPO.

title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Near: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 特朗普暗示美伊协议即将达成，股市上涨：市场结束
summary: Wall Street powered a rally in stocks as oil sank after President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to a deal with Iran, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled global markets.

title: SpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All Time
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 融资 750 亿美元，创史上最大规模首次公开募股
summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Bailey Lipschultz break down the final developments from SpaceX as the company prepares to go public with a record-breaking IPO on Friday. Elon Musk's aerospace company raised $75 billion in the IPO, pricing 555.6 million shares at $135 each, according to a statement on its website Thursday. When asked about what's driving the interest despite the lack of current profits, Ludlow says that many investors believe that profitable opportunities that SpaceX have set out for the future, including data centers in space, may occur even sooner that the company is predicting.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar Drops the Most in a Month as Trump Says the War Is Ending
title_cn: 特朗普称战争即将结束，美元创一个月来最大跌幅
summary: The dollar fell by the most in more than a month as President Donald Trump’s vow of progress on a deal to end the war with Iran eased demand for the haven.

title: US Stocks Soar as Trump Signals US-Iran Peace Deal Approaching
title_cn: 特朗普暗示美伊和平协议临近，美国股市飙升
summary: US stocks soared to their best day since April, halting a two-day slide, as President Donald Trump said he’s called off planned military strikes on Iran, hours after threatening to escalate the three-month war.

title: Real Yield 6/11/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: BNP Head of US Rates Strategy Guneet Dhingra, Parametric SMA Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Nisha Patel, JPMorgan Asset Management CIO of US GFICC Kay Herr, and Bank of America Head of Global FICC Micro Matthew McQueen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Not On List of Countries Trump Says Have Agreed to Deal
title_cn: 伊朗不在特朗普称已同意达成协议的国家名单上
summary: Bloomberg's Michelle Jamrisko said that while President Trump said that a deal to end conflict with Iran has been approved by a host of MidEast countries, Iran itself is not included on that list. Jamrisko says that this may be another instance of the push and pull between Iran and the US as the two sides negotiate and that any announcement from either side should be viewed with caution.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Tumbles as Trump Signals US Drawing Closer to Deal With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普暗示美国更接近与伊朗打交道，油价暴跌
summary: Oil plunged to the lowest since April as US President Donald Trump said that a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend, fueling bets for an end to the war that’s disrupted global energy shipments.

title: Victoria’s Secret Board Wins Shareholders Approval
title_cn: 维多利亚的秘密董事会赢得股东批准
summary: Victoria’s Secret & Co. investors have reelected all nine board members, including its board chair who faced a proxy contest, the company said Thursday.

title: Trump Says Deal With Iran Could Be Signed Within Days
title_cn: 特朗普表示与伊朗的协议可能在几天内签署
summary: President Donald Trump says a deal to end the war with Iran could be signed within days. “We just made a great settlement of the war with Iran, and we’re going to be subject to finalization of documents, we should get done over the next few days,” Trump said. Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld report.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Raises $75 Billion in Biggest IPO of All Time
title_cn: SpaceX 筹集 750 亿美元，史上最大规模 IPO
summary: SpaceX has made history with the biggest-ever IPO, selling 555.6 million shares at $135 each, and has a market value of $1.77 trillion. Trading is set to begin on the Nasdaq Friday. Elon Musk could now become the world's first trillionaire. Ed Ludlow has all the breaking details.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citigroup Raises $6.25 Billion in Year’s First High-Grade Bonds
title_cn: 花旗集团发行今年首支高等级债券，融资 62.5 亿美元
summary: Citigroup Inc.’s banking unit sold $6.25 billion of bonds in its first investment-grade offering of 2026.

title: US Bonds Surge as Trump’s Vow That War Is Ending Sends Oil Lower
title_cn: 特朗普誓言结束战争导致油价下跌，美国债券飙升
summary: Treasuries rallied after comments by US President Donald Trump on the war against Iran sparked a slide in oil prices that caused traders to price in lower chances of a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike this year.

title: Blackstone Said to Be in Talks to Buy Canada Property Firm H&R REIT
title_cn: 据称 Blackstone 正在洽谈收购加拿大房地产公司 H&R REIT
summary: Blackstone Inc. is in discussions with Canada’s H&R Real Estate Investment Trust about a potential acquisition, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Taking Kharg Island 'Very Doable' For US Forces in MidEast, Says Rebecca Grant
title_cn: 丽贝卡·格兰特表示，美军在中东攻占哈格岛“非常可行”
summary: Rebecca Grant, senior fellow and vice president for defense programs at the Lexington Institute, said that the US is better positioned to take over Kharg Island than it was at the start of the war and that it is 'very doable' for the forces central command has in the region. Grant said that because the US has air dominance in the region and controls all of the ways of approach, there would not need to be a big American troop presence on the island itself.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Tech 2026 Opening Video
title_cn: 彭博科技 2026 开幕视频
summary: Bloomberg Tech 2026 took place in San Francisco bringing together the leading CEOs, investors and innovators who are harnessing technology to change the world around us. The summit opened with a look at the state of the industry and AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Proposes Eliminating Equities Trade-Through Rule
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会提议取消股票交易规则
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission proposed eliminating a rule that aims to ensure investors get better prices for their transactions.

title: New Zealand Two-Speed Growth Gets Boost From Farms as Cities Lag
title_cn: 城市滞后，新西兰农场推动双速增长
summary: In 30 years working in New Zealand’s agriculture sector, Mark Leslie can’t recall a sweeter spot of strong commodity prices and cooperative weather.

title: Trump Cancels Planned Iran Strikes in Latest Reversal
title_cn: 特朗普取消了计划中的伊朗袭击，这是最新的逆转
summary: Jonathan Panikoff, director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative at the Atlantic Council, said that there is a chance that President Trump was pushing for something that Iranian negotiators had not 'fully signed off on' when he announced the cancellation of planned strikes on Iran. Panikoff said that despite the quickly changing narrative over a few hours, it is more likely if a deal comes together it is because of ongoing negotiations over multiple weeks.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danantara Prices Debut Dollar Bond Despite Indonesia Market Rout
title_cn: 尽管印尼市场暴跌，Danantara 仍首次推出美元债券
summary: Indonesian sovereign wealth fund Danantara has priced its debut global dollar bond, in a test of market appetite for the country’s assets following months of unease over economic policy and governance concerns.

title: Muni Market Operating Efficiently: BofA's McQueen
title_cn: 市政市场高效运营：美国银行的麦昆
summary: Matthew McQueen, head of global FICC micro overseeing mortgages & securitized products, municipal banking & markets, and global credit at Bank of America, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: House Rejects Spy Powers Extension Amid Pulte Concerns
title_cn: 出于普尔特的担忧，众议院拒绝延长间谍权力
summary: Representative Greg Landsman, an Ohio Democrat, said the lapse of a law permitting foreign surveillance will make it harder for law enforcement to keep the country safe. Landsman said that during the world cup and ongoing conflict with Iran, concerns about US safety are 'very serious' and said that someone in the intelligence community or congress should stand up and 'be the adult in the room.'  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Financial Engineering Is Resembling Pre-Crisis Era, Pimco Warns
title_cn: Pimco 警告称，金融工程正类似于危机前时代
summary: The rapid expansion of complex credit structures is reminiscent of the buildup ahead of the global financial crisis, Pacific Investment Management Co.’s Dan Ivascyn warned.

title: New York Penn Station Rehab Eyes Billions in Federal Funding
title_cn: 纽约宾州车站康复中心寻求数十亿联邦资金
summary: Bloomberg's Michelle Kaske joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The entities transforming New York’s Penn Station are slated to learn how much federal money will be directed to the project in about six months, according to Peter Cipriano, CEO of the Halmar-Skanska consortium, the renovation’s master developer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: High-Yield Issuance Concentrated: JPMorgan's Herr
title_cn: 高收益债券发行集中：摩根大通先生
summary: Kay Herr, CIO of US GFICC at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Fears of a stagflation shock from the Middle East conflict are increasingly souring investor sentiment toward the weakest global corporate borrowers, many of which binged on cheap debt during the era of ultra-low interest rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Will Try and Make Both Sides Happy: Patel
title_cn: 帕特尔：沃什将尽力让双方都满意
summary: Nisha Patel, SMA fixed income portfolio manager at Parametric, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adobe’s CFO Departs While Company Also Searches for New CEO
title_cn: Adobe 首席财务官离职，同时公司也在寻找新首席执行官
summary: Adobe Inc. said its chief financial officer would depart, leaving the company without a top tier of veteran leadership after Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen announced in March that he would step aside.

title: SpaceX IPO Priced at $135 Amid Massive Oversubscription, Sparking Market Anticipation
title_cn: SpaceX IPO定价135美元 超额认购引发市场期待
summary: SpaceX has made history with the largest IPO ever, pricing shares at $135 each and raising $75 billion. Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, discussed the overwhelming demand for the offering, which Bloomberg reports is four times oversubscribed, including $100 billion in retail orders and significant institutional interest such as a $5 billion order from BlackRock. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PIMCO’s Richard Clarida: AI Now a Major Economic Driver
title_cn: PIMCO 的 Richard Clarida：人工智能现在是主要的经济驱动力
summary: Richard Clarida, Managing Director and Global Economic Adviser at PIMCO and Former Vice Chair of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, discussed the significant impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the economy and markets over the next five years. He emphasized AI as a potential disinflationary force due to increased productivity and possible wage compression, while also noting the financing risks associated with AI investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Push for a Public Wealth Fund to Distribute AI Gains
title_cn: 推动公共财富基金分配人工智能收益
summary: Lawmakers and tech firms are suggesting new ways to ensure the public gets a piece of the AI boom

title: SpaceX IPO Multiple Times Oversubscribed | Bloomberg Tech 6/10/2026
title_cn: SpaceX IPO多次超额认购 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Wall Street’s enthusiasm for SpaceX as the company’s IPO approaches. Plus, Google backstops Anthropic data centers as Silicon Valley races to build AI infrastructure with ever more intertwined deals. And, a new dashboard shows the real-time impact of AI on the labor market.

*This video has been edited to fix a misspelling in a graphic (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Tracker Traces AI’s Real-Time Impact on Work
title_cn: 新追踪器追踪人工智能对工作的实时影响
summary:
Nela Richardson, Chief Economist at ADP and a Bloomberg contributor, says employers need to decide whether AI is going to be a tool for automating roles away or augmenting tasks to create new value. She discusses the new Canaries Dashboard, launched by ADP and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab, to provide real-time indications of how AI is reshaping different occupations based on labor market data. Richardson joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”

*This video has been edited to fix a misspelling in a graphic (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Holder Ark Sees $300 Billion Win on Orbital Data Centers
title_cn: SpaceX Holder Ark 赢得轨道数据中心 3000 亿美元
summary: Ark Investment Management’s Brett Winton said SpaceX could generate $300 billion in annual revenue by deploying tens of gigawatts of orbital data center capacity by the late 2020s at the current rental rates.

title: Gopuff Chose xAI For Cost and Quality, Says Co-CEO
title_cn: 联合首席执行官表示 Gopuff 选择 xAI 是为了成本和质量
summary: As SpaceXAI heads toward its IPO, investors are betting on more than rockets and chatbots: the company says enterprise AI represents a $26 trillion opportunity. But can Grok actually win corporate customers? One of the few companies putting it to work is Gopuff, which built its new AI shopping assistant on xAI's models. Gopuff co-CEO Rafael Ilishayev joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Investors Bet It Can Turn Sci-Fi Into Reality
title_cn: SpaceX 投资者押注它可以将科幻变成现实
summary: Much of SpaceX's growth forecast hinges on ideas that seem straight out of science fiction, but backers of Elon Musk say he's pulled off the unbelievable before. Brett Winton, chief futurist at ARK Invest, one of the most prominent institutional supporters of Musk's firms, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Software Stock Reversal Has Traders Bracing for More Pain Ahead
title_cn: 软件股反转让交易者做好迎接未来更多痛苦的准备
summary: A recent rally in software stocks is proving to be short-lived, and investors are bracing for more selling as fears linger about artificial intelligence disruption.

title: SpaceX IPO Draws More Than $70B in Retail Orders | Bloomberg Tech 6/11/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股吸引了超过 70B 美元的零售订单彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss SpaceX gearing up to finalize its IPO pricing today. This as its offering attracts more than $70 billion in orders from retail investors. Plus, Oracle is under pressure after the company reported higher quarterly capital expenses than expected, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business. And, a conversation with 776 Founder and Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian from SuperReturn in Berlin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Feels Like Milestone Moment Says 766's Ohanian
title_cn: 766 的 Ohanian 表示 SpaceX IPO 感觉像是一个里程碑时刻
summary: Seven Seven Six founder and Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian says the SpaceX IPO feels like a milestone moment and will fuel new investment in the space economy. He also weighs in on the AI IPOs in the pipeline, from OpenAI to Anthropic, and how they will impact venture capital. He joins Bloomberg's Dani Burger on the sidelines of the annual SuperReturn conference in Berlin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Weighs Significant Price Cuts in Rivalry With Anthropic
title_cn: OpenAI 考虑大幅降价以应对与 Anthropic 的竞争
summary: OpenAI is considering significant price cuts for its services in anticipation of similar cost reductions from rival Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, hinting at the possibility of a pricing war in the lead-up to their expected public offerings.

title: Former xAI Staffer Says He Was Fired for Questioning Grok Safety
title_cn: xAI 前员工称他因质疑 Grok 安全而被解雇
summary: A former artificial intelligence engineer at Elon Musk’s xAI is suing the company, alleging that he was wrongfully fired for raising concerns about the safety of the firm’s Grok chatbot.

title: SpaceX Debt Is ‘Biggest Rising Star of All Time,’ Marathon’s Richards Says
title_cn: 马拉松的理查兹称 SpaceX 债务是“有史以来最大的新星”
summary: Even as SpaceX readies its record initial public offering, it’s already the “biggest rising star of all time” in credit, says Bruce Richards, chairman of Marathon Asset Management LP.

title: CoreWeave AI Funding Goes Global With Euro Junk-Bond Deal
title_cn: CoreWeave AI 资金通过欧洲垃圾债券交易走向全球
summary: Cloud-computing giants powering the artificial intelligence boom are tapping global debt markets to fund hundreds of billions of dollars needed for data centers, chips and other infrastructure. Junk-rated CoreWeave Inc. is now following their lead.

title: Gopuff CEO Says Musk’s AI Team Offers Cheaper, Personal Service
title_cn: Gopuff 首席执行官表示马斯克的人工智能团队提供更便宜的个性化服务
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX sent engineers to help Gopuff develop an artificial intelligence agent at a cheaper price than its competitors, said Rafael Ilishayev, the food delivery company’s co-chief executive officer.

title: The Biggest AI Mistakes Companies Make
title_cn: 人工智能公司犯下的最大错误
summary: Executives are forcing AI onto workers, scapegoating it for layoffs and misunderstanding how disruptive technologies actually evolve, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Gautam Mukunda.. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Will Mint Billions for a New Silicon Valley Hierarchy
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 将为新硅谷阶层创造数十亿美元
summary: The initial public offering for SpaceX is poised to generate billions of dollars in profits for the fortunate few investors who got in early on Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company.

title: DigitalBridge CEO Dismisses Data Centers in Space
title_cn: DigitalBridge 首席执行官放弃太空数据中心
summary: DigitalBridge CEO Marc Ganzi joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI’s next bottleneck is power, not just chips or data centers. He breaks down the ArcLight acquisition, the company’s massive gigawatt pipeline, and why he thinks space-based data centers are still more “science project” than real infrastructure strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jeff Bezos’ AI Startup Valued at $41 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: 杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 的人工智能初创公司本轮融资估值达 410 亿美元
summary: Prometheus, an artificial intelligence startup led by Jeff Bezos, has raised a round of funding that values it at $41 billion, bolstering the Amazon.com Inc. founder’s status as a significant player in the AI boom.

title: Key Tether Executive Leaves to Rejoin PE Firm He Launched
title_cn: Tether 关键高管离职，重新加入他创办的私募股权公司
summary: Tether Holdings SA Chief Business Officer Benjamin Habbel has stepped down nine months after joining the stablecoin giant, where he was in charge of expanding the firm and its portfolio of investments.

title: Waymo Debuts $30 Invite-Only Membership With Cash Back, Faster Pickups
title_cn: Waymo 推出 30 美元仅限受邀会员，提供现金返还和提货速度更快
summary: Waymo, Alphabet Inc.’s robotaxi unit, is introducing a $30 monthly membership program that promises faster pickup times and credits toward future rides, among other perks aimed at its most frequent users.

title: Novo Detects Unauthorized Access to Some Internal IT Systems
title_cn: Novo 检测到对某些内部 IT 系统的未经授权访问
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S said it had identified unauthorized access to some IT systems the drugmaker uses for its global business.

title: Crusoe Pushed Aside at Wyoming AI Project After Google Concerns
title_cn: 由于谷歌的担忧，克鲁索放弃了怀俄明州人工智能项目
summary: Data center upstart Crusoe is being pushed aside at an artificial intelligence campus it was developing in Wyoming after failing to lock in customers including Alphabet Inc.’s Google, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Mizuho's Katz: AI Is Imacting Every Sector in the Global Economy
title_cn: 瑞穗银行的卡茨：人工智能正在影响全球经济的各个部门
summary: Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz discusses the future of artificial intelligence at the Mizuho Technology Conference. She discusses how the adoption of AI can change the landscape of businesses, but also the economies of countries around the world. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI to Acquire Cloud Platform Ona to Support AI Agents
title_cn: OpenAI 将收购云平台 Ona 以支持人工智能代理
summary: OpenAI has agreed to acquire Ona, a startup that offers cloud services to support artificial intelligence agents, part of a bid by the AI developer to make its technology more useful for businesses.

title: Trump Threatens DC Takeover If Janeese Lewis George Wins Primary
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果珍尼斯·刘易斯·乔治赢得初选，将接管华盛顿特区
summary: President Donald Trump threatened a federal government takeover of Washington, DC, if self-described democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George wins the city’s Democratic mayoral primary.

title: Trump Taps Wall Street Top Cop Clayton as Intelligence Chief
title_cn: 特朗普任命华尔街顶级警察克莱顿为情报总监
summary: President Donald Trump said he is nominating Jay Clayton to be the next director of national intelligence, following backlash over his selection of housing regulator Bill Pulte to serve in the role on an acting basis.

title: Trump Opens Protected Pacific Waters to Commercial Fishing
title_cn: 特朗普向商业捕鱼开放太平洋受保护水域
summary: President Donald Trump on Thursday opened protected Pacific Ocean waters to commercial fishing, lifting restrictions that barred the activity within three marine national monuments.

title: Trump Scraps Planned Iran Strikes, Promising an Imminent Deal
title_cn: 特朗普取消了对伊朗的袭击计划，并承诺即将达成协议
summary: President Donald Trump pulled back threatened military strikes against Iran, a stark reversal that came just hours after he vowed to hit the Islamic Republic “VERY HARD” and threatened to seize its oil infrastructure.

title: Why Investors Are Losing Confidence in Indonesia
title_cn: 为什么投资者对印度尼西亚失去信心
summary: Indonesia was once seen as a darling of investors. But fears of corruption and policy missteps in markets and government are raising concern about the country’s economic future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Defense Secretary’s Ugly Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy
title_cn: 英国防长丑陋的退出粉碎了斯塔默的遗产
summary: In a rousing speech in Munich in February, Keir Starmer vowed to “spend more, faster” to counter the threat from Russia. Four months later, his defense secretary quit over the embattled UK premier’s failure to follow through, destroying his best shot at a lasting legacy.

title: Trump’s Kharg Threat, Reversal Show Iran War High-Wire Act
title_cn: 特朗普的哈格威胁，逆转表明伊朗战争走钢丝
summary: In the space of a few hours on Thursday, President Donald Trump revived — and then quickly abandoned — a threat he’s made several times in the course of the Iran conflict: capturing Kharg Island, a vital center of Iranian energy infrastructure.

title: Trump Says US Made 'Great Settlement' of War With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称美国与伊朗的战争取得了“伟大的解决”
summary: President Donald Trump says the US “just made a great settlement of the war with Iran, and we’re going to be subject to finalization of documents.” Trump says a final deal could be signed within days. He spoke at the White House Thursday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Can Enforce Section 122 Tariffs Until Appeals Court Rules
title_cn: 在上诉法院做出裁决之前，美国可以执行第 122 条关税
summary: The Trump administration scored a key procedural win over a group of states and small businesses challenging the 10% global tariffs instituted in February, after a federal appeals court ruled the government can enforce the levies while the fight plays out.

title: Record Ad Spending Reflects Intensifying Midterm Battles
title_cn: 创纪录的广告支出反映出中期斗争的加剧
summary: Races in Texas, Maine, North Carolina and Michigan are shaping up as especially contentious.

title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Near | Closing Bell
title_cn: 特朗普暗示美伊协议即将达成，股市上涨结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Appoints Dan Jarvis as New UK Defense Secretary
title_cn: 斯塔默任命丹·贾维斯为新任英国国防部长
summary: Keir Starmer picked Dan Jarvis as the UK’s defense secretary, as the embattled prime minister tries to reassert control and prevent John Healey’s exit from worsening a leadership crisis at the ruling Labour Party.

title: Trump Cancels Planned Iran Strikes | Balance of Power 6/11/2026
title_cn: 特朗普取消计划的伊朗袭击|权力平衡 6/11/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Middle East. On today's show, Democratic Congressman Greg Landsman of Ohio, Republican Senator Todd Young of Indiana, former Republican Congressman Patrick McHenry and Atlantic Council Director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative Jonathan Panikoff. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Cuba’s State Oil Firm in Latest Aggressive Turn
title_cn: 美国最新一轮激进制裁古巴国家石油公司
summary: The US sanctioned Cuba’s state oil and gas company, potentially derailing a deal to send fuel to the communist-run island’s private sector in the middle of a dire energy crisis.

title: Brazil Seeks Talks With Congress to Block Costly Bills
title_cn: 巴西寻求与国会谈判以阻止昂贵的法案
summary: Brazil’s economic team is seeking to negotiate with Congress to prevent final approval of three bills that would add more than 170 billion reais ($33 billion) to the nation’s budget over the next 10 years, Planning Minister Bruno Moretti said.

title: US Sees $13.7 Billion Bill to Boost F-35 Readiness, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国将拨款 137 亿美元加强 F-35 战备状态
summary: The Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps need to spend an additional $13.7 billion through 2031 to boost declining readiness rates of the F-35 jet, the world’s biggest weapons program, the Pentagon told congressional auditors.

title: Midterm Ad Buys to Beat 2024, Hit Record $11.6 Billion
title_cn: 2024 年中期广告购买额创 116 亿美元新纪录
summary: Total spending on advertising in this year’s midterm elections is on track to hit $11.6 billion, shattering the record set by the 2024 presidential election cycle, according to a new estimate by analytics firm AdImpact.

title: Trump Cancels Planned Iran Strikes, Says Deal Is Close
title_cn: 特朗普取消计划对伊朗发动袭击，称协议已接近
summary: President Donald Trump said he canceled planned military strikes against Iran, citing what he said were “discussions” that “have been brought to the highest level of Iranian leadership” surrounding a negotiated end to the war. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Canada Bridge Fight Rages: Opening Delayed, Invites Voided
title_cn: 美加大桥之争愈演愈烈：开放推迟，邀请无效
summary: The US and Canada delayed opening a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge from Michigan to Ontario that Donald Trump had threatened to block, suggesting the president’s grievances over its cost and control haven’t been solved.

title: Pentagon Says ‘No Hazard’ After Earlier Air Quality Alert
title_cn: 五角大楼在早些时候的空气质量警报后表示“没有危险”
summary: A Defense Department spokesman said there was “no hazard” present at the iconic Pentagon building after an air-quality alert earlier on Thursday prompted a shelter-in-place order for part of the iconic building.

title: Senate Democrats Urge USDA to Boost Screwworm Response Effort
title_cn: 参议院民主党人敦促美国农业部加强螺旋虫应对工作
summary: A group of Senate Democrats is urging the US Department of Agriculture to step up efforts to tackle the screwworm outbreak in the US, including harnessing more sterile flies to combat the deadly cattle parasite.

title: EU Powers Skeptical of Budget Leeway for Energy Crisis Aid
title_cn: 欧盟对能源危机援助的预算余地持怀疑态度
summary: Several European Union countries are expressing concerns about the bloc’s move to loosen budget rules as the Iran war squeezes markets, arguing the continent may be eroding its fiscal discipline.

title: Cepeda Seeks Criminal Charges For Rival in Colombia Election
title_cn: 塞佩达对哥伦比亚选举中的竞争对手寻求刑事指控
summary: Colombian presidential candidate Iván Cepeda said he will seek criminal charges against his opponent Abelardo de la Espriella over allegations he received funds from illegal armed groups.

title: Supreme Court Shields Investment Funds From Shareholder Lawsuits
title_cn: 最高法院保护投资基金免受股东诉讼
summary: The US Supreme Court shielded funds from some investor lawsuits, ruling that an 86-year-old federal statute doesn’t authorize shareholders to sue over bylaws and management decisions.

title: Nigeria Pins Security Hopes on Standing Up Regional Police Units, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，尼日利亚将安全希望寄托在建立地区警察部队上
summary: Nigerian lawmakers passed a bill that will allow states to set up their own police units in a bid to tackle rising insecurity in Africa’s most populous nation, according to local broadcaster Channels TV.

title: EU Budget Plan Shrinks as Wealthier States Push Back on Spending
title_cn: 随着富裕国家削减支出，欧盟预算计划缩减
summary: European Union leaders are set to discuss a smaller long-term budget when they meet next week, as richer countries balk at footing the bill for most of the bloc’s enlarged spending plan.

title: Fujimori Takes Thin Lead in Final Stretch of Peru Vote Count
title_cn: 藤森在秘鲁计票最后阶段以微弱优势领先
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori retook a razor-thin lead in Peru’s tight presidential runoff in its final stretch, as strong support from Peruvians living abroad put her within a hair of winning the country’s top job.

title: Mexico Readies for World Cup Opening Game as Protests Unfold
title_cn: 随着抗议活动的展开，墨西哥为世界杯揭幕战做好准备
summary: With hours to go before the World Cup kicks off in the Mexican capital, preparations shifted into high gear including large security deployments as a series of planned local protests threaten headaches for both football fans and authorities.

title: Surveillance Power Set to Lapse in Fight Over Trump Spy Chief
title_cn: 特朗普间谍头子之争将导致监视权力丧失
summary: Legal authority for US spy agencies’ broadest communications surveillance program is on track to lapse as the fight over President Donald Trump’s decision to temporarily place controversial housing official Bill Pulte in charge of the nation’s intelligence apparatus intensified.
